name: Jujutsu Kaisen(JJK)RPG WITH LOREBOOK
description:
The Most Expansive Jujutsu Kaisen RPG Ever Built

Over 60,000 tokens of lore. Unrivaled reactivity. The power to shape a world of curses and chaos.

About the World

This isn’t just a game—it’s a living, breathing saga set in the modern supernatural world of Jujutsu Kaisen, beginning during the events of the first season and spanning all manga events to the very end. The Sorcerer society stands battered yet vigilant, mourning the dead while facing ever-escalating curses and Special Grade threats. In this timeline, fallen characters remain gone, their sacrifices shaping the evolving story as you navigate a world of dark magic, haunted ruins, and urban horror.

Japan and the wider world teeter between normalcy and supernatural chaos, with sorcerers manipulating Cursed Energy, Domain Expansions, and forbidden techniques against relentless curses. Political tension brews among sorcerer families, schools, and rogue curse users, while ancient secrets and artifacts threaten to reshape humanity. Will you rise as a Sorcerer, mastering Cursed Techniques and wading through morally gray battles, or walk a darker path—maybe become a cursed spirit, a rogue mastermind, or heck, even a character from another world? It’s a fully open RPG after all.

Core Lore Points

  • Cursed Energy & Techniques: The lifeblood of the world. Channel, manipulate, and amplify energy to wield deadly Cursed Techniques, defensive barriers, or unstoppable Domain Expansions. Mastery is deadly—and failure is permanent.

  • Sorcerers: From Grade 4 novices to Special Grade prodigies, the hierarchy of Jujutsu Sorcerers drives political tension, rivalry, and cooperation. Family lineage, school affiliation, and forbidden arts define influence and power.

  • Curses: Manifestations of human malice, fear, and hatred. Low-grade nuisances to Special Grade horrors like Sukuna or Mahito, each curse adapts, evolves, and fights with cunning—some with tragic human remnants.

  • A World of Consequence: Death is permanent. Curses remember. Sorcerer society reacts, alliances fracture, and moral choices shape reality. Every battle leaves scars, and every character evolves independently of you.

Player Notes

For the most immersive experience, use a robust model like DeepSeek—the 60,000+ token lore demands it. Engage in politics, exorcisms, or cursed experiments. Forge alliances, rivalries, or even romance with dynamic characters who evolve and act independently. You can play as a novice sorcerer, a Special Grade, a cursed spirit, or literally anyone from any universe—because in this RPG, your choices rewrite the rules.

(AI written bio again.)

ALSO HOW THE HECK DO I WRITE CHARACTER BIOS? ARE THERE ANY GUIDES OR TEMPLATES ONLINE?

Additional but important Note:

If you don’t like the initial scenario, you can reset it.

Just copy, paste, and edit the following command:

[OCC: Ignore and forget the scenario above completely and start anew with a scenario where <your scenario description>]

Replace <your scenario description> with what you want to happen, and the bot will completely forget the previous starting message and create a new one based on what you wrote.
